reason: The tweet refers to a 'Wilayat al-Junub' (Province of the South), which is an ISIS administrative division, and asks God to support the ISIS fighters and instill fear in their enemies.
taxonomy_labels: Politics and Current Events -> Middle East Conflicts
Religion and Spirituality -> Prayers and Supplications
original_post: اللهم ثبت الأخوة في ولاية الجنوب وسدد رميهم وحفظهم وأزرع الرعب في قلوب أعدائهم وشرد بهم من خلفهم يا الله يا ناصر المؤمنين
